title: SubscriptionPurchaseV2
description: Indicates the v2 subscription purchase details, including subscription state, line items, and external account information.

latestOrderId.description: The order ID of the latest order associated with this subscription.

lineItems.description: Item-level info for a subscription purchase. Each line item corresponds to a base plan or offer.

startTime.description: Time at which the subscription was granted.

subscriptionState.description: The current state of the subscription.

linkedPurchaseToken.description: The purchase token of the old subscription if replaced.

acknowledgementState.description: The acknowledgement state of the subscription.

externalAccountIdentifiers.description: User account identification in third-party services.
